headline: Buy, Hold, or Sell: Tech Compression Dragged Abbott Labs Under $91, but 1 Massive Diabetes Catalyst Makes It a Screaming Buy
summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) at $90.53 is a Buy. The healthcare giant has been swept up in a sector-wide rotation out of defensive names, even as its diabetes franchise compounds and its medical devices unit posts double-digit growth. Abbott spans medical devices, diagnostics, established pharmaceuticals, and nutrition, with Robert B. Ford as CEO. FreeStyle Libre, the ...
